title: Accounts Payable Specialist - 6 Months, Convertible
description:
What you'll do:

As an Accounts Payable Specialist in this regional finance team based in Singapore, you will be entrusted with responsibilities that span supervision of payment operations, cashflow forecasting under sophisticated arrangements, policy enforcement for compliance purposes, vendor data management, issue resolution for stakeholders at all levels, identification of process inefficiencies for improvement recommendations, participation in business maturity initiatives leveraging technology or operational enhancements, contribution to a nurturing team culture through knowledge sharing and supportiveness, as well as upholding professionalism in every aspect of your work. Your day-to-day activities will involve close coordination with various departments including tax and treasury functions across APAC regions. Success in this role requires enthusiasm for learning new skills within a fast-evolving environment where your input directly influences operational excellence.

  • Forecast and monitor cashflow across the region under a cash pooling arrangement while coordinating effectively with the Treasury team on liquidity management.
  • Establish, document, and enforce policies, processes, and controls within the accounts payable function to ensure compliance with relevant standards and regulations.
  • Maintain vendor data integrity by overseeing regular updates and ensuring adherence to statutory requirements.
  • Act as the main point of contact for resolving complex issues or queries from both internal teams and external vendors, evaluating situations thoroughly before recommending process improvements.
  • Identify inefficiencies within current accounts payable practices and recommend enhancements that promote greater efficiency or compliance outcomes.
  • Participate actively in continuous business maturity projects alongside other members of the finance team as well as wider organisational units to implement operational improvements or technological solutions.
  • Contribute positively to a collaborative team culture by sharing knowledge, supporting colleagues’ development, and fostering an inclusive environment.
  • Ensure all activities are conducted with professionalism, discretion, and attention to detail while maintaining high standards of accuracy.

What you bring:

To excel as an Accounts Payable Specialist in this organisation’s regional finance team based in Singapore, you will bring proven expertise managing payables functions, ideally gained within multinational environments, and hands-on involvement in integration projects linking banking platforms with enterprise resource planning systems. Your comprehensive grasp of indirect tax rules across APAC markets will underpin your ability to maintain compliance while implementing robust financial controls. A genuine enthusiasm for acquiring new skills sets you apart as someone who embraces ongoing professional development. Your exceptional organisational capabilities ensure accuracy even when handling complex transactions or sensitive data. Effective communication, both written and verbal, is essential for building strong relationships internally as well as externally. You flourish amid flexibility and change thanks to your commitment to quality outcomes. Professionalism guides your interactions at all times while your willingness to share knowledge supports collective success within the finance team.

  • Demonstrated experience managing accounts payable functions within a regional or multinational organisation; prior leadership experience is highly desirable.
  • Proven track record supporting integration projects between banking platforms and ERP systems.
  • Comprehensive understanding of indirect tax regulations and statutory reporting requirements relevant to APAC jurisdictions.
  • Hands-on experience implementing financial processes and controls; familiarity with Oracle Fusion is preferred but not mandatory.
  • Enthusiastic approach towards learning new skills coupled with a passion for personal development within finance operations.
  • Exceptional organisational abilities complemented by meticulous attention to detail when handling sensitive financial information.
  • Outstanding communication skills, both written and verbal, that enable effective collaboration across teams and external partners.
  • Ability to thrive in an inclusive environment characterised by flexibility, dynamism, and rapid change without compromising quality or accuracy.
  • High degree of professionalism combined with discretion when dealing with confidential matters or complex stakeholder queries.
  • Commitment to fostering teamwork through knowledge sharing while supporting colleagues’ growth within a communal setting.

What sets this company apart:

This organisation stands out for its commitment to creating an inclusive workplace where every individual’s contributions are valued. Employees benefit from flexible working arrangements designed to accommodate diverse needs while promoting work-life balance. The company invests heavily in training opportunities so you can continue expanding your skillset throughout your career journey. Supportive leadership fosters an environment where collaboration thrives, whether you’re working on cross-functional projects or sharing insights during team meetings. Knowledge sharing is encouraged at every level so you always feel connected within a dependable network of professionals who care about each other’s growth. The company’s reputation for operational excellence is matched only by its dedication to nurturing talent through generous support structures that help you achieve both personal fulfilment and professional advancement.

What's next:

If you are ready to take on this exciting challenge as an Accounts Payable Specialist in Singapore’s thriving finance sector—apply now!

Apply today by clicking on the link provided.

Do note that we will only be in touch if your application is shortlisted.
Robert Walters (Singapore) Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
ROBERT WALTERS (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD

Robert Walters Plc is an award-winning specialist recruitment consultancy with over 54 offices in more than 28 countries. Here in Singapore, we specialise in placing candidates on a permanent or contract basis in the following specialties: accounting & finance, compliance, front office, human resources, information technology, internal audit, legal, marketing, operations, risk & treasury, sales, secretarial & business support, supply chain, procurement & logistics and technical healthcare.
